mapper.sql: CASE status WHEN 0 THEN 'pending' WHEN 1 THEN 'approved' WHEN 2 THEN 'rejected' WHEN 3 THEN 'published' WHEN 4 THEN 'draft' ELSE 'unknown' END AS status_str
mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at,
FROM image WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at,
FROM image WHERE category = #{categoryName} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image (title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{category}, #{photographer}, #{date}, #{url}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE image SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at,
FROM image WHERE status = 4 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE image SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
